role_summary: Multi-stage Dockerfile defining build contexts for a Python backend and Node.js frontend, concluding with a placeholder runtime stage.
extracted_finding: The system utilizes a multi-stage build process to separate backend (Python 3.12-slim) and frontend (Node.js 22-slim) environments. The final runtime stage (debian:stable-slim) does not serve an application but instead outputs a directive to configure services via docker-compose.yml, indicating this Dockerfile serves as a build definition or template rather than a standalone executable service.
